reference: I SAY WHAT MADE MY IGNOMY WHATE'ER THE BITTER CUP I DRAIN FAR BE FRO ME THAT LAND TO FLEE NOR WILL I BOW TO THOSE WHO BLAME AND FOR SUCH LOVE WOULD DEAL ME SHAME
text: i say what made my ignominy whatever the bitter cup i drain far be from me thy land to flee nor will i bow to those who blame and for such love would deal me shame
